title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Whisky Exchange Ltd
body: "Application number 3733 Applicant The Whisky Exchange Holdings Limited objected to the name used by Whisky Exchange Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On 22 June 2022 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Whisky Exchange Ltd is changed to 13680471 Ltd. "
